summary: Retest of route-guard fix for Siri Boutique. ALL targeted scenarios PASS. Hard refresh on /admin, /admin/orders, /account, /checkout (with item in cart), and /services/book/svc-blouse no longer bounce to login when authenticated. Admin SPA navigation across all 7 sections (Dashboard ↔ Orders ↔ Bookings ↔ Products ↔ Coupons ↔ Customers ↔ Reports) works without the previously-fixed Promise-cleanup overlay. No regressions observed.
critical_code_review_comments: Route guards now correctly gate on `loading === false` from AuthContext before redirecting — verified in AdminLayout, AccountPage, CheckoutPage, ServiceBookingPage. Pattern is consistent and safe.

Bonus: LoginPage/register paths in the redirect now include `?next=/account|/checkout|/services/book/...` query params so the post-login UX is preserved (visible in source — not e2e-verified but code is correct).
test_credentials: Admin admin@siriboutique.in / SiriAdmin@2026 ✓ ; Demo demo@siriboutique.in / demo1234 ✓
seed_data_creation: None this iteration. One product was added to demo customer's cart for the /checkout refresh test; cart can be cleared from UI.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Route-guard race-condition fix verified end-to-end on the live preview URL. AdminLayout, AccountPage, CheckoutPage, ServiceBookingPage all correctly call `useAuth()` for both `user` and `loading`, return null/early during loading, and only redirect when loading is done and user is null. SPA navigation across admin pages confirmed clean (no destroy-is-not-a-function overlay). The previously identified Bug 1 (Promise useEffect) and Bug 2 (auth-guard race) are both resolved. App is in a healthy state for further feature work.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — both prior bugs are resolved. Verification matrix: refresh_admin=PASS, refresh_admin_orders=PASS, refresh_account=PASS, refresh_checkout=PASS (with item), refresh_booking=PASS, admin_spa_nav (7 tabs)=ALL OK, no runtime overlay.
